examples: He thought that he, far from being a routed general, had meritorious service to his credit.
Perform meritorious service to atone for one's crimes so as to obtain clemency from the people.
The 23-year-old suspect earned recognition for meritorious service while in Afghanistan.
It originally was designed to honor "any singularly meritorious action, " according to Washington's orders.
It was the last meritorious awards ceremony before the launch of the single force Police Scotland in April.
